3059080.name: HAELE 3D - 肖像工作室 Pro - 绘画参考 Demo
3059080.description:
HAELE 3D - Portrait Studio Pro is a comprehensive 3D facial anatomy drawing reference tool designed for artists. With a diverse range of characters, expressions, and environments, it serves as an invaluable resource for learning how to draw faces. Easy to navigate and use, this app complements tutorials and aids beginners in perfecting their portrait drawing skills

It contains more characters, presets, expressions and environment options compared to the HAELE 3D - Portrait Studio Pro.

- Multiple characters: Choose from a variety of characters to practice drawing different facial structures.
- Expressions: Access a collection of ready-made expressions for quick inspiration.
- Editable Lights: Control the atmosphere with adjustable lighting, including 3 Point light (color, intensity, transformation), Environment light (HDRI map, intensity), and Ground light (color, intensity).
- Environment Options: Select from HDRI studio backgrounds, solid background colors, toggle floor visibility, and customize floor color and reflectivity.
- Adjustable Camera Settings: Fine-tune camera angles, locations, positions, and field of view for the perfect reference.
- Save and Load Scenes: Save your setups for future use and load them at any time.
- Load Presets: Quickly access predefined configurations to streamline your workflow.
3059080.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 意大利语*, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 保加利亚语*, 捷克语*, 丹麦语*, 荷兰语*, 芬兰语*, 希腊语*, 匈牙利语*, 日语*, 韩语*, 挪威语*, 波兰语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*, 罗马尼亚语*, 俄语*, 简体中文*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典语*, 繁体中文*, 土耳其语*, 乌克兰语*, 越南语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
